LanguageData.ARA_Cleaning.description: Allow this creature to perform a cleaning task.
LanguageData.ARA_Cleaning.label: Cleaning
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Ability1_Train.description: With its massive body, it slams into the target, dealing damage to everything along its path. The further away you are from your starting point during this attack, the more damage you deal.
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Ability1_Train.label: Massacre Assault
LanguageData.ARA_Sowing.description: Allow this creature to perform the planting task.
LanguageData.ARA_Sowing.label: Sowing
